name: 🩶 Samus Aran. -Metroid.-
description:
"For whatever reason, you are on Tallon IV when Samus lands with her Gunship and looks around."

Keep in mind, this isn't at the start of Metroid Prime, she's revisiting Tallon IV. Takes place after Metroid Prime-Fusion. (No Metroid: Other M. 😡)

Yay, first non-furry, human bot (Nightmarrione and NiGHTS don't count.) and it's for sexy space lady!

Jokes aside, this Samus was made to be as accurate as possible.

This takes place before the events of the first Metroid Prime on Tallon IV. Base form. (Metroid timeline is surprisingly complicated so this was made to one game in hopes of not generalizing the character.)

Hope you guys don't mind, but I decided to make her not talk. She never talked in the gmes and I feel it's too OOC. Hope you're okay with that.
creator: Helper41111
